---
title: "FLAMEResult"
generated: true
description: "Per-voxel FLAME fit output."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.lme.flame`](../nitrix-stats-lme-flame.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:FLAMEResult -->
```python
class FLAMEResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:FLAMEResult -->
Per-voxel FLAME fit output.

`weights` is the per-voxel, per-subject outlier-deweighting weight (audit
N4): all `1` for the standard FLAME fit (`robust=False`), and the
converged robust weights in `(0, 1]` for `robust=True` -- a value well
below `1` marks a subject whose level-1 estimate was down-weighted as an
outlier.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:FLAMEResult.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(sigma_b_sq: Float[Array, 'V'], gamma_hat: Float[Array, 'V p'], log_lik: Float[Array, 'V'], weights: Float[Array, 'V N']) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:FLAMEResult -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
